notes: Eval 3 (full-checklist) shows no discrimination — both with_skill and without_skill scored 100%. The checklist task is too broad; adding the skill doesn't change output quality when the agent already has access to the same codebase.
Eval 1 (quick-fixes) shows the strongest discrimination: with_skill=100% vs without_skill=33%. The skill adds specific knowledge about startup validation checks that a general code audit misses.
with_skill runs are consistently faster and use fewer tokens than without_skill runs, suggesting the skill helps agents focus on the right issues without extensive code exploration.
